message:
feat(lzma): Replace stubs with liblzma C library calls

Like CPython, use system liblzma via lzma.h:
- Implemented compress() using lzma_easy_encoder() + lzma_code()
- Implemented decompress() using lzma_stream_decoder() + lzma_code()
- Updated LZMAFile.read() to use liblzma for XZ and LZMA_ALONE formats
- Removed error.LzmaAloneNotImplemented (now fully supported)

Removed all 11 NotImplemented stubs from lzma.zig.

Compression libraries now linked:
- libbz2: 1.0.8 (bz2.zig - 12 stubs removed)
- liblzma: 5.8.1 (lzma.zig - 11 stubs removed)

This matches CPython's approach:
- CPython's Modules/_bz2module.c links bzlib.h
- CPython's Modules/_lzmamodule.c links lzma.h

Total stubs removed: 23 compression stubs
Remaining stubs: 10 (test.support.interpreters - low priority)
